title: Evangelion in Hungary
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion in Hungary             Quote Post by Luigi shinji » Thu Jan 03, 2019 6:19 pm Hello every one, I'm a hungarian evangelion fan. I joined this forum a few years ago, but I don't really active in here becouse my english language knowledge is pretty bad (and becouse I'm a pretty introvert guy ) so I don't have enough courage to write something on here. But I really want to discussion with somebody about a pretty inportant news in hungarian perspective which is: Neon Genesis Evangelion is going to releas on Netflix in spring 2019. NGE is NEVER released in hungary in any official way (there are fan sub's in some video site and you can download it with hungarian fan subtitle on Ncore but that's it). So I want to know, becouse Netflix released on hungary in 2016, is this mean's that NGE get an official hungarian subtitle or even an official hungarian dub? I would be really happy if Evangelion get an official released in hungary. Even without that, I just want to talk Evangelion in Hungary in general,(which is not a big thing becouse there's nothing any officia stuff in here), so if there's any hungarian people here, or your a non hungarian person but your interested in this topic (which is pretty inpossible becouse why are you interested if your not hungarian?) you can discussing in here. Also I want this topic as a archive of the hungarian EVA fan sub's so if you know any hungarian fan sub you can share in here if you want to. I hope this topic is not againts the rule's of this forum.

[]: Re: Evangelion in Hungary             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Jan 03, 2019 6:54 pm As discussed elsewhere on this site, we know nothing officially of Netflix's plans in regard to dubbing and subbing Evangelion. There is an assumption that they will redo the main languages, but how many markets they will aim for we can only guess. For an example, the latest anime that interested me from Netflix was Forest of Piano , released just last September. It had dubs in 7 languages and subs in 23 languages, and Hungarian was not one of them. (I think you can expect a mod to remove your link, though; a link to the fansubs alone would probably be acceptable.)

[]: Re: Evangelion in Hungary             Quote Post by Luigi shinji » Thu Jan 03, 2019 7:04 pm pwhodges wrote: As discussed elsewhere on this site, we know nothing officially of Netflix's plans in regard to dubbing and subbing Evangelion. There is an assumption that they will redo the main languages, but how many markets they will aim for we can only guess. For an example, the latest anime that interested me from Netflix was Forest of Piano , released just last September. It had dubs in 7 languages and subs in 23 languages, and Hungarian was not one of them. (I think you can expect a mod to remove your link, though; a link to the fansubs alone would probably be acceptable.)

[]: Re: Evangelion in Hungary             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Jan 04, 2019 5:25 am I'm not Hungarian, but I'm Austrian, and I live pretty close to the Hungarian border, if that helps...

[]: Re: Evangelion in Hungary             Quote Post by Luigi shinji » Sun Jan 06, 2019 8:29 am robersora wrote: I'm not Hungarian, but I'm Austrian, and I live pretty close to the Hungarian border, if that helps...
